category_sources: Official/homepage references identify TtH as a TeX-to-HTML translator.
source_facts.description states this is a TeX/LaTeX to HTML converter.
display_name_sources: Official TtH references use the stylized display name TtH.
docs_sources: TtH manpage and package references point to hutchinson.belmont.ma.us/tth/manual.cgi as the more up-to-date manual.
source_facts.homepage provides the official TtH homepage.
repo_sources: No official source-control repository was identified from source_facts or official TtH documentation references.
tags_sources: source_facts.description identifies TeX/LaTeX to HTML conversion.
source_facts.executables lists command-line tools including tth, latex2gif, and ps2gif.
